uncertainties: The requested root-level file /home/adam/dev/personal/skills/copilot-install.sh is intentionally part of the design problem even though it does not exist in the current checkout.
Preserving current behavior means keeping ./scripts/copilot-install.sh as the canonical supported entrypoint because all live repo docs already standardize on it.
Any convergence plan should also account for overlapping install mechanics inside scripts/addy-install.sh, since that is where the meaningful duplication risk now lives.
